name: Clarvia
description: AI agent tool discovery and AEO (AI Engine Optimization) scoring platform. Discover, score, and validate 27,831+ MCP servers and AI tools for agent readiness.

skills.name: Tool Discovery
skills.description: Search and discover 27,831+ indexed MCP servers and AI tools by name, category, or capability. Returns compatibility scores and metadata.

skills.name: AEO Score Analysis
skills.description: Analyze any MCP server or API endpoint for AI Engine Optimization (AEO) readiness. Returns a 0-100 score with detailed breakdown across documentation, schema compliance, response quality, and agent compatibility dimensions.

skills.name: Vulnerability Check
skills.description: Audit MCP server configurations and npm dependencies for known security vulnerabilities. Returns CVE matches and severity ratings.

skills.name: Tool Comparison
skills.description: Compare multiple MCP servers or AI tools head-to-head with AEO scores, feature matrices, and agent compatibility metrics.

skills.name: Find Alternatives
skills.description: Find alternative MCP servers and AI tools for a given tool. Returns ranked alternatives by AEO score and feature similarity.

skills.name: Demand Intelligence
skills.description: Track trending AI tools and MCP servers. Monitor search trends, adoption rates, and emerging tools in the ecosystem.
